item.title: Several tools, techniques, factories ... I've found amazing recently.
item.description:
Casting low-melt alloy bars
2. Car Factory Robots
3. Ceiling work made easy
4. Kinda gross but efficient
5. Simple invention DIY Handmade Tools
6. High-Speed CNC Machining in Action
7. Looks nice and smooth
8. It's that easy ! get a good knocker.
9. This Screwdriver.
10. TIL about plastic welders.
11. For people that work on the ground. Banana for scale.
12. One fits all. Works probably on new screws only.
13. Broom head factory.
14. Foam so smooth it looks like he’s working with whipped cream.
15. Physical Key Copying.

item.title: Coming Out... as a DJ (Finally)
item.description: Told you all I would keep sharing my content here as I continue to just... make more and more of it in various forms ;D In my latest YoutTube vid I talk a little about learning to DJ and why, and spin for a bit just to have some fun! Part of me wants this to make the FP if only to make people see my terrible thumbnail pun there and groan.... Check it out to watch me do some spinning! https://youtu.be/HaloxZVxlAE

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 15
item.description:
Is this thing on?
Ah nuts
I ONLY fart sexy style ;)
Poorly and then I wake up with something hurting because I apparently did it wrong :/
I can’t remember if it was on Imgur or Reddit where I saw someone say they sing a song to their dog that goes “My name is Beatrice. I have to pee-ah-triss”
Fucking bet
Every fucking time
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: Cuteness Overload :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Meeeeeeeeeme dump 2nd for the day
item.description:
Dunno how many dumps I'll do tonight but we'll see when the dog gets up from her nap. She played hard with her cousin this afternoon. Until then, enjoy!
Holy shit it's only Monday
Hey. My own dump isn't supposed to make me cry.
Last week at the grocery store, an old white man yelled at the deli clerk, "hey! Do you guys have any of that jarlsburg stuff?" But he pronounced it "Jar-els-berg". I stopped and bluescreened a minute before moving on without commenting. It's good cheese, it doesn't deserve that disrespect. Neither does the cheese girl.
[Cough] my dad [cough]
I bet it honked and spit steam
Saved this for my dad, who taught me basic electrical work. He cackled at the guy going over the fence.
I need an SO so I can play this game. It's so stupid, I love it.
100% border collie behavior
I've seen healthier looking people with severe metabolic diseases
Hell of a way to learn I'm radical reformed. I always thought I was ultra protestant as an ELCA Lutheran who thinks the church with lesbian pastors is still too conservative
Why are you booing me, I'm right
Meerkatting. I might try this at work the next time my fellow millennials are all in the office.
What's that you said about my ma, mate? Come at me. I'll bite your legs off.
They're good dogs Bront
Also a good dog
I don't think people should be taking medical advice from me.... BRO IT'S YOUR JOB. You don't deserve it, but still.
Look Bones, no hands!
Taught a class on the psych of video games. Used this to discuss grief. Quoted this at least 7x that day.
Fuck you, rich tourists, I do what I want.
I didn't have the power glove but my brother in law did. And a virtual boy!!!
Lmao, reminds me of a student who fact checked me in class (which I encourage) and got mad that I was right. Sweetie, I spent 10 years extra in school for this, lol.
♡
Chaotic good. Do what has to be done.
I go through mints like crazy, but they do help
Best part of this is Myamoto in his nerdy little t shirt
My 1yo collie doesn't give a shit if someone is holding her tail. This video is my explanation to those who comment about it. Ball is life.
Sent to my bestie in the literature dept. We're just a couple of millennial punks approaching 40.
I need more philosophy to be read by klingons
Dog and cat tax. Snuggle party with Clarice and Violet!
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: A CEO had gotten Luigi'd back in March.
item.description:
An employee has been charged in connection with the killing of the CEO of a trucking company in Crestwood, police announced on Sunday. Josif Suclea was charged with first-degree murder. Crestwood police said just after 4 p.m. on March 5, officers and fire crews responded to a call of heavy smoke coming from the ATG Truckload company at 13835 S. Kostner Avenue. The small fire was extinguished by fire crews at the scene. Afterward, the body of a man, identified as 46-year-old Dane Koteski, was found on the second floor. According to its website, Koteski was the president and CEO of the trucking company. An autopsy conducted by the Cook County Medical Examiner's Office ruled Koteski's death a homicide resulting from injuries to his neck caused by a sharp or pointed object. Task force investigators for several hours followed numerous leads pointing to a suspect, later identified as Suclea, who was learned to be an employee that targeted the victim. The crime was deemed to be an isolated incident. Investigators learned that Suclea was located at a truck stop in Holland, Michigan. The Holland Police Department conducted an operation resulting in his arrest. Suclea was extradited from Ottawa County, Michigan, back to Crestwood on Friday. His bond hearing is scheduled for noon on Sunday at the Cook County Courthouse in Chicago. Source: https://www.cbsnews.com/amp/chicago/news/employee-charged-killing-of-trucking-ceo-crestwood/
Recently released court records show that the CEO who was allegedly murdered by his own driver owed the man a “substantial amount of money”. 46-year-old ATG Truckload CEO, Dane Koteski, was found “lying face down in a pool of blood” in his office as it burned on March 5th in Crestwood, Illinois. On Sunday, March 16th, 53-year-old Josif Suclea, a truck driver for ATG, was charged with first-degree murder for the incident. Now, court documents point to a potential motive for the serious crime. According to ABC 7, Suclea was a long-time truck driver for ATG, and Koteski had recently told him that ATG “was going bankrupt.” Koteski also “owed a substantial amount of money to Suclea,” but “was unable to pay him.” Security footage shows Suclea following Koteski into the company office at 2:37 p.m. on March 5th. Koteski is then seen stepping into another room to take a phone call, and Suclea follows him. There was then allegedly a “brief struggle and then crying is heard from the room.” Koteski can be heard asking “why?” and Suclea responds “I had to.” When asked, the person on the other end of the phone described hearing “scuffling and muffling and then the victim’s phone went dead.” The phone was later found “in a trash bin in the ATG [Truckload] office” with “a bloody fingerprint.” Suclea then fled the scene in an ATG Freightliner semi truck, and was tracked to a truck stop in Holland, Michigan, where he was arrested and found “in possession of a large folding knife.” Investigators later found “blood on the steering wheel” and on the truck floorboards. It has since been determined that Koteski’s throat was cut. Suclea is currently being held without bail in Cook County and has a hearing scheduled for Tuesday, March 18th. He has been diagnosed with cancer and is undergoing treatment. It is unclear when he was diagnosed. There are no records of ATG Truckload formally filing for bankruptcy. https://archive.is/O0kFb
Curious that this news story from March is only getting spotted now. Almost like it wasn't in the interest of CEOs for this to be too public.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer
